tests.name: render-title-headline-and-paragraph
tests.stdin:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Length: 96 Content-Type: text/html Demo

Hello

Bytes & bits.
tests.expected_stdout:
status=200 OK
title=Demo
body:
Hello
Bytes & bits.

tests.name: preserve-non-success-status
tests.expected_stdout:
status=404 Not Found
title=(none)
body:
Not found.

tests.name: normalize-whitespace-breaks-and-entities
tests.stdin:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK content-length: 107 Tiny Web one
two < three
four five
tests.expected_stdout:
status=200 OK
title=Tiny Web
body:
one
two < three
four five

tests.name: reject-lf-only-framing
tests.expected_stdout: error: malformed HTTP framing (missing CRLF header terminator)

tests.name: reject-content-length-mismatch
tests.expected_stdout: error: Content-Length 5 does not match 4 body bytes

tests.name: http-10-case-insensitive-header-and-tags
tests.stdin:
HTTP/1.0 204 No Content
content-length: 26
X-Test: ok

<HTML><BODY></BODY></HTML>

tests.name: reject-duplicate-content-length-before-html
tests.expected_stdout: error: invalid or duplicate Content-Length header

tests.name: reject-unsupported-entity-without-partial-render
tests.expected_stdout: error: unsupported or malformed HTML entity

tests.name: reject-unclosed-body-structure
tests.expected_stdout: error: unclosed or missing HTML title/body structure

tests.name: reject-nul-byte-before-protocol-parsing
tests.expected_stdout: error: HTTP response contains a NUL byte
